title: dubautia linearis
intro: Dubautia linearis, also known as Island Dubautia, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It is a shrubby plant with white or pink flowers and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties. The leaves and roots of the Dubautia linearis plant are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which may provide relief from respiratory issues and promote wound healing.
